channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 3.6%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Angela Rayner says Starmer should ‘reflect on’ stepping aside after HMRC clears her over tax affairs - UK politics live
item.description: Angela Rayner says Starmer should ‘reflect on’ stepping aside after HMRC clears her over tax affairs - UK politics live

item.title: BBC Politics: 'I've been exonerated': Angela Rayner says HMRC has cleared her over flat stamp duty
item.description: 'I've been exonerated': Angela Rayner says HMRC has cleared her over flat stamp duty

item.title: BBC Politics: Potential leadership challengers jostle for positions as PM's allies warn of 'chaos'

item.title: Bloomberg.com: Starmer Rivals Ready Bids, UK GDP Rises, More - Bloomberg.com

item.title: BBC Politics: Watch: Angela Rayner settles tax affairs - what now?
item.description: Watch: Angela Rayner settles tax affairs - what now?

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer latest: Rayner settles unpaid tax bill to pave way for leadership bid
